summary: Tested CS Kanban UI Overhaul features: Login flow with CLT Animation, CS Summary Bar, Shadow Cards in Upgraded column, Color Tag API, and color tag styling across CS/BD/Mentor pages. All backend tests passed (24/24). Frontend features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CS Kanban features fully tested. Login animation fix verified - CLT Animation completes in ~13 seconds and redirects to /home. Summary bar shows stage counts and period revenue. Upgraded column displays shadow cards from cs_upgrades with green 'Upgraded · AED X,XXX' banners. Color tag API (PATCH /api/students/{id}/color-tag) works for all 5 tag types. Color tag picker visible in CS student detail modal. BD CRM (/bd) and Mentor CRM (/mentor/crm) have color tag styling implemented on cards.

login_flow.details: Login with aqib@clt-academy.com works. CLT Animation displays candlestick chart animation. Redirects to /home after ~13 seconds.

cs_summary_bar.details: Summary bar shows stage counts (New Student: 36, Activated: 882, etc.) and Period Revenue: AED 379,053

cs_upgraded_column_shadow_cards.details: Upgraded column shows 119 shadow cards from cs_upgrades with green 'Upgraded · AED X,XXX' banners

color_tag_api.details: PATCH /api/students/{id}/color-tag works for handle_with_care, do_not_disturb, vip, priority, follow_up

color_tag_picker_in_modal.details: CS student detail modal shows Tag section with all 5 color tag options

stage_summary_api.details: GET /api/students/stage-summary returns stage_counts, total_students, period_upgrades, period_revenue

upgrade_shadows_api.details: GET /api/students/upgrade-shadows returns shadow cards with is_shadow=true

bd_crm_color_tags.details: BD CRM at /bd has COLOR_TAG_STYLES implemented on BDStudentCard component

mentor_crm_color_tags.details: Mentor CRM has MENTOR_COLOR_TAG_STYLES implemented on StudentCard component
